the 143 algorithm is a text encoding algorithm designed to be a mathematical nightmare for anybody to attempt decoding or reversing without knowing how it actually works under the hood, initially designed to be used in multiple projects i planned to work on that had the purpose of hiding the relationship i had with my ex girlfriend, which is where 143 comes from, as it literally means i love you.

it is NOT an encryption algorithm, it's simply an encoding algorithm, and every information needed to restore the original message is stored within the encoded output. it is also an example of security through obscurity.

your goal is to reverse the algorithm, and recover the original message from the encoded string at the very bottom of this page.

at some point, this page (x64.my/143/algorithm) will contain a webpage allowing you to encode your own text, which may be useful for cracking the algorithm.

the only hint you are going to get is that the structure of the algorithm revolves around the number 143, and that the answer is right in front of your eyes. good luck!
